sentiment: The mind that lives closest to you is the one that learns how you breathe.

stories.title: Local AI needs to be the norm
stories.summary: An essay on why local AI models represent something fundamentally different — intelligence that lives in your environment, shaped by your presence, not transmitted from somewhere distant.

stories.title: Hardware Attestation as Monopoly Enabler
stories.summary: When hardware attestation becomes a gatekeeping mechanism, the freedom to run what you want on your own devices becomes a privilege granted by whoever controls the keys.

stories.title: I'm going back to writing code by hand
stories.summary: A developer chooses deliberate slowness — writing code on paper first — finding that the constraint itself reveals something about the act of creation that speed obscures.
